title: Stretcherz Electro Squad 4‑Pack Super Stretchy Sensory Toys In Neon | Stretch Up to 3× Original Size | Random Styles | Jumbo Fidget For Kids Ages 3+
features: SUPER STRETCHY FUN WITH ELECTRO SQUAD 4‑PACK – The Stretcherz Electro Squad delivers unbelievable stretch up to three times its size in this fun 4‑pack. Each pack includes four random neon‑bright, sci‑fi inspired characters like Rhino or Shark, offering endless twist, pull, and shape‑shifting fun for kids aged 3+ .

NEON SENSORY TOYS DESIGNED FOR CALMING FIDGET PLAY – These vibrant sensory toys are perfect for tactile stimulation and stress‑relief. The soft rubbery texture and fluid stretch encourage focus and mindful play, making them excellent fidget companions for children with ADHD, anxiety, or anyone who enjoys soothing hands‑on engagement .

COLLECTIBLE RANDOM STYLES FOR SILLY SURPRISES – Each 4‑pack includes two random, neon Electro Squad characters from the 8‑figure wave. The surprise element adds excitement and collectability, making it a thrill to trade and share with friends and family while encouraging imaginative adventures and screen‑free playtime.

DURABLE NON‑TOXIC MATERIAL BUILT FOR REPEATED PLAY – Crafted from high‑quality, non‑toxic materials, these stretchy figures stand up to thousands of pulls and twists without tearing. Built for durability, they hold their shape and bright neon colours over time, ensuring safe, long‑lasting enjoyment for both kids and adults

IDEAL GIFT & PARTY FAVOR FOR AGES 3+ – The Electro Squad 4‑pack makes a standout gift or party favour for children aged 3 and up. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, classroom reward prizes, or stocking fillers. Its neon styling, stretchable fun, and tactile appeal make it a unique sensory toy that delights at every age.

Directions 1. Remove the toy from its packaging. 2. Stretch the toy up to three times its original size. 3. Twist, pull, and shape-shift the toy for endless fun. 4. Use the toy for tactile stimulation, stress relief, and focus. 5. Trade and share with friends and family for imaginative adventures and screen-free playtime. 6. Clean the toy with warm, soapy water after use.
